description: The ParticleRibbonsModule component makes it to where a particle system will have ribbons that connect particles based on distance and other factors.

fields.Material: The material to give the ribbons
fields.TextureMode: How to handle viewing the texture specified on the ribbons.
fields.MotionVectorMode: How to handle the rendering of ribbons in regards to motion vectors.
fields.GenerateLightingData: Whether to generate lighting data for the ribbons.
fields.RibbonPointRatio: How many of the particles should be ribbons.
fields.Distribution: How to distribute the ribbon followers.
fields.MaxRibbonPoints: The max amount of ribbon points there should be.
fields.InterweavedRibbonCount: The amount of long particle-interconnected ribbons there can be, essentially multiple ribbons rather than one ribbon line.
fields.UseParticleColor: Whether to use the color of particles the ribbons are following.
fields.UseParticleSize: Whether to use the size of particles the ribbons should follow.
fields.ShuffleInterweavedRibbons: Randomly moves interweaved ribbon groups to new particles when they are generated.
fields.SizeInheritanceMode: How to inherit the size of the particles the ribbons are following.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
